author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
vṛṣabhānu-sutā⋅, caraṇa⋅sevane,
hoiba je pālyadāsī
śrī-rādhāra sukha, satata sādhane,
rahiba āmi prayāsī

śrī-rādhāra sukhe, kṛṣṇera je sukha,
jāniba manete āmi
rādhā-pada chāḍi’, śrī⋅kṛṣṇa⋅saṅgame,
kabhu nā hoiba kāmī

sakhī-gaṇa mama, parama suhṛt,
jugala⋅premera guru
tada-nugā haye, seviba rādhāra,
caraṇa⋅kalpataru

rādhā-pakṣa chāḍi’, je⋅jana se⋅jana,
jebhāve sebhāve thāke
āmi ta’ rādhikā⋅, pakṣa-pātī sadā,
kabhu nāhi heri tā̐’ke
translation_intro: From The Harmonist, October 1932. Edited by Bhaktisiddhanta Sarasvati.
en_translation:
For serving the Feet Of the Daughter of Brishavanu I shall be Her protected maid; To serve constantly The pleasures of Sree Radha Shall be my endeavour.

The Pleasure of Krishna By Sree Radha’s Happiness I shall experience in my mind; Abandoning Radha’s Feet To seek my union with Sree Krishna Shall never be my desire.

The sakhis are My best friends, Teachers of love frr the Divine Pair; By following their example I shall serve The Purpose-Tree of the Feet of Radha

Whoever the person, Whatever his ways, Who breaks away from Radha, Myself who am Radha’s constant partisan Shall never brook his sight.
